name: virola spp.
contraindications: avoid with unstable mental health conditions
safetyNotes: May cause moderate risk: side effects or medication interactions are plausible. do not combine with serotonergic drugs or maois without medical guidance, lower dose or stop if nausea, vomiting, or gi upset occurs, nausea, intense hallucinations, elevated heart rate or may interact with maois. Avoid with unstable mental health conditions; Avoid with heart issues.
description: Amazonian trees producing dmt-rich resins for shamanic snuffs.
